riddle: I am the smallest country in the world. I'm completely surrounded by Italy and I'm where the Pope lives. Who am I?
hint: Look for a tiny dot inside Rome, Italy

riddle: I'm an island country where people speak English, but I'm in the middle of the Indian Ocean. Giant tortoises and coco de mer nuts are my treasures. Who am I?
hint: Look east of Africa in the Indian Ocean

riddle: I'm the only country that's a whole continent by myself. Kangaroos, koalas, and the Great Barrier Reef are all mine. Who am I?
hint: The biggest island in the southern hemisphere

riddle: I'm a tiny mountain country between France and Spain. I have amazing ski slopes but I'm so small you can drive across me in 30 minutes! Who am I?
hint: Look in the Pyrenees Mountains between France and Spain

riddle: People here invented sushi, anime, and bullet trains. I'm made of over 6,800 islands and cherry blossoms are my symbol. Who am I?
hint: An island country in East Asia
badge: Land of the Rising Sun Seeker

riddle: I'm the largest country in the world by land — so big I span 11 time zones! I have the world's deepest lake and ballet was invented here. Who am I?
hint: The biggest country on the map, in northern Eurasia

riddle: I have the world's highest waterfall called Angel Falls. I also have more oil than any country on Earth! Who am I?
hint: On the northern coast of South America

riddle: My country is shaped like a boot! I have the Colosseum, the Leaning Tower, and more pizza restaurants than you can count. Who am I?
hint: A boot-shaped peninsula in southern Europe

riddle: I'm the coldest, windiest, and driest continent. Millions of penguins live here but no people do! Who am I?
hint: The southernmost place on Earth

riddle: People here discovered coffee over 1,000 years ago. I also have more wild animals per square kilometer than almost any African country. Who am I?
hint: A landlocked country in the Horn of Africa

riddle: I'm so flat that most of my country could disappear underwater if sea levels rise just 1 meter. I have the most beautiful beaches in the Indian Ocean. Who am I?
hint: A chain of tiny islands in the Indian Ocean south of India

riddle: I have more pyramids than Egypt! My ancient civilization built them along the Nile over 3,000 years ago. Who am I?
hint: South of Egypt in northeastern Africa

riddle: I'm one of the world's tiniest countries and I have a famous car race called the Grand Prix that goes through my city streets. Who am I?
hint: A tiny country on the French Riviera, near Nice, France

riddle: I'm famous for the Great Wall that stretches for 13,000 miles. I have more people than any other country in the world. Who am I?
hint: The third-largest country by area, in East Asia

riddle: I invented the game of chess! Well, actually ancient Persia did, and I'm Persia's modern name. I have beautiful mosques and flying carpets in stories. Who am I?
hint: A large country in the Middle East, east of Iraq

riddle: I'm the world's largest archipelago with over 17,000 islands. I have orangutans, Komodo dragons, and the Spice Islands! Who am I?
hint: An archipelago country in Southeast Asia between Australia and mainland Asia

riddle: My country was called the 'Land of a Thousand Hills.' I'm home to mountain gorillas and have one of the fastest-growing economies in Africa. Who am I?
hint: A tiny landlocked country in East Africa, between Uganda and Congo

riddle: I have the world's largest salt flat — it's so shiny after rain that it looks like a giant mirror. I also have two capitals! Who am I?
hint: A landlocked country in the heart of South America

riddle: I'm the world's biggest island that's not a continent. I'm mostly covered in ice, but my southern coast is actually green and liveable. Who am I?
hint: A huge island between the Arctic Ocean and the Atlantic, belonging to Denmark

riddle: I'm a tiny island country in the Atlantic Ocean right near Europe. I have no army, and I'm known as the 'Happiest Country in the World.' Who am I?
hint: An island country in the North Atlantic, between Europe and Greenland

riddle: The Amazon River, the world's largest rainforest, and Carnival all started here. I produce more coffee than any country except Ethiopia. Who am I?
hint: The largest country in South America

riddle: I'm a tiny country surrounded entirely by South Africa. I sit so high in the mountains that even my lowest point is high above sea level. People call me 'Kingdom in the Sky.' Who am I?
hint: A tiny mountain kingdom completely surrounded by South Africa

riddle: I'm shaped like a butterfly from above because I'm actually two islands connected by a bridge! I have a giant active volcano and beautiful beaches in the Caribbean. Who am I?
hint: A French island territory in the Caribbean

riddle: The tallest mountain in the world, called Everest, is in my country. Most people say I'm where the bravest mountain climbers on Earth come from — the Sherpas. Who am I?
hint: A small country between India and China in the Himalayas

riddle: I'm the world's largest democracy and have more languages than almost any country. I have tigers, elephants, and the Taj Mahal. Who am I?
hint: A huge country in South Asia, south of the Himalayas

riddle: I'm the birthplace of the Olympics, democracy, and the alphabet! My ancient ruins are visited by millions of tourists every year. Who am I?
hint: A country at the southern tip of Europe with many beautiful islands

riddle: I have more volcanoes per square kilometer than almost any country. I'm in Central America and people go 'volcano boarding' here — sliding down a volcano on a board! Who am I?
hint: The largest country in Central America, south of Honduras

riddle: I've never been colonized by any European power — I'm one of the only African countries that stayed independent. And I have the world's oldest church still in use! Who am I?
hint: Also known as Abyssinia, a landlocked country in the Horn of Africa

riddle: I'm a long, thin country that stretches almost the entire length of South America. I have glaciers AND deserts AND tropical islands, all in one country! Who am I?
hint: A very long, narrow country on the western coast of South America

riddle: I'm a 'Land of Fire' — natural gas has been burning here for thousands of years. I have more mud volcanoes than any country on Earth! Who am I?
hint: A country on the Caspian Sea, between Russia and Iran

riddle: I invented waffles, chocolate pralines, and french fries (yes, really!). I'm a small country that's home to NATO and the European Union headquarters. Who am I?
hint: A small country between France, Netherlands, Germany, and Luxembourg

riddle: I'm the country with the most different languages in the world — over 800! My birds of paradise are the most spectacular in the animal kingdom. Who am I?
hint: The eastern half of the island of New Guinea, north of Australia

riddle: I'm called the 'Pearl of the Indian Ocean.' The dodo bird lived here once, and I have an underwater 'waterfall' that's actually just sand on the seafloor. Who am I?
hint: A volcanic island in the Indian Ocean east of Madagascar

riddle: I'm the only country in South America where most people speak Dutch! I have one of the most biodiverse rainforests on Earth. Who am I?
hint: A small country on the northeastern coast of South America, east of Guyana

riddle: I'm a tiny mountain republic that claims to be the world's OLDEST republic — founded way back in 301 AD! I'm surrounded entirely by Italy. Who am I?
hint: A tiny country on top of Mount Titano, surrounded by Italy

riddle: I have more elephants than any country on Earth — over 130,000! I also have diamond mines and one of the most peaceful democracies in Africa. Who am I?
hint: A landlocked country in southern Africa, between Zimbabwe and Namibia

riddle: I invented reggae music and produced the fastest human ever to run on two legs. I'm a Caribbean island where the Blue Mountains make incredible coffee. Who am I?
hint: An island country in the Caribbean Sea, south of Cuba

riddle: I'm a tiny kingdom where polar bears outnumber people. The sun doesn't set here for months in summer! I'm part of Norway but near the North Pole. Who am I?
hint: An Arctic archipelago belonging to Norway, way up near the North Pole

riddle: I have no military at all — I abolished my army in 1948 and spent the money on schools instead! I generate almost all my electricity from rainforests and volcanoes. Who am I?
hint: A small country in Central America between Nicaragua and Panama

riddle: I'm famous for the Canal that connects the Pacific and Atlantic Oceans. Ships save thousands of miles by going through me! Who am I?
hint: The southernmost country of Central America, at the very end where it connects to South America

riddle: I have 365 beaches — one for every day of the year! I'm a tiny twin-island country in the Caribbean famous for its sailing. Who am I?
hint: A twin-island nation in the eastern Caribbean, east of Montserrat

riddle: I'm the world's largest salt-water lake country — actually, no! I'm not a lake, I'm a sea. The Silk Road went through me. I'm the largest country between Russia and the Middle East. Who am I?
hint: A giant landlocked country in Central Asia, south of Russia

riddle: Chess is a required school subject in my country. I was the first country in the world to adopt Christianity as an official religion in 301 AD! Who am I?
hint: A small mountainous country in the Caucasus region, south of Georgia

riddle: I'm a tiny country surrounded by water on three sides and Italy on one side. I'm known for my blue lagoon and I have NO mosquitoes at all! Who am I?
hint: A small island country in the Mediterranean Sea, south of Sicily, Italy

riddle: I'm where the movie Star Wars was partly filmed. Luke Skywalker's home planet is actually here in real life! I'm in North Africa on the Mediterranean coast. Who am I?
hint: A North African country between Libya and Algeria, on the Mediterranean

riddle: I'm the world's second-largest country but most of it is frozen forest! I have more lakes than all other countries combined. Who am I?
hint: The large country on top of the United States of America

riddle: My country measures 'Gross National Happiness' instead of just money! I'm carbon-negative and my flag has a dragon on it. Who am I?
hint: A small Himalayan kingdom between India and China, east of Nepal

riddle: I'm the only country where giraffes, lions, wildebeest and zebras migrate together in huge herds across the plains every year. This is called the Great Migration! Who am I?
hint: A country in East Africa, south of Kenya, home to the Serengeti

riddle: I have the tallest trees in the world! Well, not exactly — but I have the world's highest-altitude capital city. I also have the world's largest salt flat just inside my border. Who am I?
hint: A landlocked country in central South America with two capitals

riddle: I'm an island country in the Pacific where men traditionally go land diving — they jump from tall wooden towers with only vines on their ankles! This was the origin of bungee jumping! Who am I?
hint: An archipelago of 80+ islands in the South Pacific, east of Australia

riddle: I'm a tiny Pacific island nation that earns money by leasing my internet domain extension '.tv' to television companies! I could disappear underwater within decades. Who am I?
hint: A tiny Pacific nation north of Fiji, near the International Date Line

riddle: I'm one of the world's newest countries, born in 2011. I have the world's longest freshwater migration of antelopes. Who am I?
hint: A landlocked country in East Africa, north of Uganda and Congo
